matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 00001011 3
2 10110000 3
3 11110001 5
4 01100001 3
5 00011111 5
6 10100011 4
7 01011101 5

70 07 00000000 a

24 42 01010010 3 match 0
